title: Amara's Sound Adventure
synopsis: Join Amara as she discovers different sounds around her home and counts them in this colorful exploration of noise and numbers for toddlers.

pages.text: Amara loves sounds! Let's count them together.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes stands in a bright room with rainbow wavy lines floating around her, representing different sounds as colorful vibrations in the air
illustration.alt: Amara surrounded by colorful sound waves

pages.text: One bird goes TWEET! See the yellow dots dance.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes looks up at a window where small yellow dots float and sparkle, showing the bird's tweet sound
illustration.alt: Amara looking at yellow dots representing bird sounds

pages.text: Two cars go BEEP BEEP! Red zigzag lines zoom by.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes watches through a window as two red jagged zigzag lines race across the scene, visualizing car horn sounds
illustration.alt: Amara watching red zigzag lines representing car horns

pages.text: Three drums go BOOM BOOM BOOM! Purple circles bounce.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes sits near colorful toy drums with three large purple circles bouncing above them, showing the drum beats as visible vibrations
illustration.alt: Amara with drums and purple circles showing sound

pages.text: Four bells go RING RING RING RING! Silver sparkles fly.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes holds small bells while four clusters of silver sparkly dots float around her, making the bell sounds visible
illustration.alt: Amara with bells and silver sparkles

pages.text: Five frogs go RIBBIT! Green wavy lines hop around.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes sits by a pond with five bouncing green wavy lines hopping like the frog sounds they represent
illustration.alt: Amara by pond with green wavy lines

pages.text: So many sounds! Amara claps with joy. What sounds do you hear?

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes claps her hands with a rainbow explosion of dots, lines, circles, and sparkles all around her, showing all the different sounds together
illustration.alt: Amara clapping surrounded by all sound visualizations

metadata.illustrationStyle: sound made visible, wavy lines for music, jagged lines for crashes, dots for whispers, synesthesia inspired, seeing sound, color and shape for noise, vibration visual

questions.question: How many birds made sounds?
questions.explanation: One bird went TWEET with yellow dots!

questions.question: What color were the drum sounds?
questions.explanation: The drum sounds were purple circles that bounced!

questions.question: How many frogs said RIBBIT?
questions.explanation: Five frogs went RIBBIT with green wavy lines!
